  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Archer
    Archer ranged character that fires arrow projectiles.
    Attackable
    Marker interface for entities that can perform attacks.
    AttackAnimation
    Contract for characters that support frame-based attack animations.
    AttackData
    Immutable-like container describing melee hitbox dimensions.
    AttackState
    Attack state machine values used by player and character attack logic.
    AudioManager
    Centralized audio utility for background music and sound effects.
    Barista
    Barista hybrid character that throws coffee projectiles with slight arc and knockback.
    BaseProjectileAttack
    Generic projectile model used by ranged/hybrid attacks.
    Bubble
    Bubble ranged character that emits multiple bubble projectiles per shot.
    Character
    Base abstract character model shared by all playable classes.
    CharacterPane
    Visual card for one selectable character in scene 1.
    CharacterSelectScene
    Character selection scene shown before the match starts.
    Damageable
    Contract for entities that can receive and process incoming damage.
    Exorcist
    Exorcist hybrid character using projectile bullets with ammo and reload mechanics.
    Hammer
    Hammer melee character with slower but larger hitbox attack.
    HandleOwnWeapon
    Marker interface for characters that manage weapon rendering/behavior manually.
    HaveWeapon
    Marker interface for characters that use a visible weapon sprite during attacks.
    HealthBar
    Displays a compact HealthBar
    HybridClass
    Base class for hybrid characters that combine melee/ranged traits.
    Katana
    Katana melee character with fast two-frame slash animation.
    Mage
    Mage ranged character that throws tarot-card projectiles with random effects.
    Main
    JavaFX application entry point for CroissantFighter.
    MeleeClass
    Base class for melee characters.
    OwnWeaponPos
    Marker interface for characters that override default weapon positioning logic.
    Player
    Runtime player container that binds character data with scene nodes.
    PlayerLogic
    Runtime controller for a single player.
    PlayerSelection
    Top status bar used in scene 1 to display each player's current selection state.
    PlayerState
    High-level player state used by movement/combat animation logic.
    Pyro
    Pyro melee character with very fast single-frame strike timing.
    RangedClass
    Base class for ranged characters with ammo and reload mechanics.
    Scene2
    Main battle scene that hosts gameplay, HUD, timer, and end-game presentation.
    SceneHandler
    Utility class that owns a single JavaFX Scene and handles root swapping.
    Selection
    Shared static holder for both players' selected characters between scenes.
    SelectState
    Selection flow states for character pick scene.
    SkillBar
    Displays a compact skill cooldown bar.
    SkillState
    Skill availability states for character special abilities.
    SpawnAttack
    Helper contract for classes that spawn projectile attacks into the active battle scene.
    TarotType
    Tarot card variants used by Mage projectile random effect system.
    UsesAmmo
    Contract for characters that use an ammo/reload shooting model.
    Vampire
    Vampire hybrid melee character with life-steal mechanics.
